briefdescription.para: Defines the temporal centeredness of data.
Cell centered, node centered ...
Temporal centering.
Unique id.
Number of components.
Grow factor.
Default interpolator.
Can extrapolate in time?
Should store this in the checkpoint file?
Printable names of components.
Array of bndry types for entire level.
Array of pointers to bndry fill functions.
Are we a primary or secondary? (true or false)
Groupsize if we're a primary.
If mapper_comp[icomp] != 0, that map is used instead of mapper when interpolating icomp; otherwise, mapper is used.

For component icomp, max_map_start_comp[icomp] and min_map_end_comp[icomp] represent the maximum starting index and minimum ending index with which to use mapper_comp[icomp] when interpolating component icomp. These are convenient for using with "coupled" multiple component maps like CellConservativeLinear.

detaileddescription.para: If there is no need to "couple" a component, max_map_start_comp[icomp] and min_map_end_comp[icomp] simply equal icomp.

briefdescription.para: The default constructor.

memberdef.argsstring: (IndexType btyp, TimeCenter ttyp, int ident, int nextra, int num_comp, InterpBase *interp, bool extrap=false, bool store_in_checkpoint=true)
memberdef.name: StateDescriptor

briefdescription.para: Constructor that sets all data members.

parameterdescription.para: Number of components stored in the state.
Default interpolater to use between levels.
Whether to allow time extrapolation outside stored intervals.
Should this descriptor be persisted in checkpoints?

memberdef.argsstring: (IndexType btyp, TimeCenter ttyp, int ident, int nextra, int num_comp, InterpBase *interp, bool extrap=false, bool store_in_checkpoint=true)
memberdef.name: define

briefdescription.para: Define the data members if constructed with default constructor.

parameterdescription.para: Number of components stored in the state.
Default interpolater to use between levels.
Whether to allow time extrapolation outside stored intervals.
Should this descriptor be persisted in checkpoints?

memberdef.argsstring: (int comp, const std::string &nm, const BCRec &bc, const BndryFunc &func, InterpBase *interp=nullptr, int max_map_start_comp=-1, int min_map_end_comp=-1)
memberdef.name: setComponent

briefdescription.para: Configure metadata for component comp.

parameterdescription.para: Boundary condition recipe for the component.
Boundary fill functor for physical BCs.
If >=0, restricts upper bound of remapping region.
If >=0, restricts lower bound of remapping region.

memberdef.argsstring: (int comp, const std::string &nm, const BCRec &bc, const BndryFunc &func, InterpBase *interp, bool a_primary, int groupsize)
memberdef.name: setComponent

briefdescription.para: Configure component comp using explicit primary/groupsize flags.

parameterdescription.para: Boundary condition recipe for the component.
Boundary fill functor for physical BCs.
Whether this component is the primary entry for a grouped set.
How many coupled components participate in the group anchored here.

briefdescription.para: Resets boundary condition data for component comp.
Output names of components.
Returns the IndexType.
Returns StateDescriptor::TimeCenter.
Returns number of components.
Returns the grow factor.
Returns the interpolater.
Returns the interpolater used by component i.
Returns the name of component i.
Returns the BCRec of component i.
Returns all BCRecs.
Returns the BndryFunc associated with component i.
Return true if the component range [sc, sc+nc) lies within this descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: Number of components in the range.

briefdescription.para: Return true if all components in [scomp, scomp+ncomp) share the same interpolater.
Returns contiguous component ranges (start,count) that share identical interpolaters within [scomp, scomp+ncomp).
Can extrapolate in time.
Should store this StateData in the checkpoint file.
Return whether component i is the primary entry of a grouped set.
Return the size of the component group anchored at primary component i.
will it run on gpu?
has new fab version of BndryFunc?
Control thread-safety flag for boundary fill functors (nonzero ext_dir_safe triggers thread-safe handling).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int *lo, const int *hi, const int *dom_lo, const int *dom_hi, const int *bc, int ng)
memberdef.name: bf_thread_safety

briefdescription.para: Attributes of StateData.
